task: Parse an AWS CloudWatch log entry and extract the timestamp, log level, and message using regex
solution_criteria: Regex pattern should correctly capture timestamp (ISO 8601 format), log level (INFO, ERROR, WARNING, DEBUG), and the remaining message content from a standard CloudWatch log line

task: Write a Python function that takes an AWS S3 bucket name and returns True if it follows AWS naming conventions (lowercase, no underscores, 3-63 characters)
solution_criteria: Function should validate bucket name against AWS S3 naming rules and return a boolean; should handle edge cases like consecutive hyphens and starting/ending with hyphens

task: Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that accepts environment variables for DB_HOST, DB_USER, and DB_PASSWORD, with timeout set to 30 seconds
solution_criteria: JSON should be a valid AWS Lambda configuration with Environment.Variables section containing the three specified variables and Timeout property set to 30
